title: Login page crashes with expired JWT token
description: When a user tries to log in with an expired JSON Web Token, the application throws an unhandled NullPointerException and displays a 500 Internal Server Error page instead of redirecting to the login screen.
steps:
1. Open the application in Chrome
2. Wait for the JWT token to expire (or manually set an expired token)
3. Click on any authenticated page
4. Observe the crash
expected: The application should detect the expired token, clear the session, and redirect the user to the login page with a friendly message.
actual: The application crashes with a 500 Internal Server Error. The stack trace shows NullPointerException at AuthService.validateToken():142.

title: User authentication fails when token expires
description: Authentication system does not handle expired tokens properly. Users see a blank white page when their session token expires during active use.
steps:
1. Log into the application
2. Leave the browser idle for 30 minutes
3. Try to navigate to the dashboard
4. Page goes blank
expected: Graceful session expiration with redirect to login page and session expired message.
actual: Blank white page with no error message. Console shows 'Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read property token of null'.
logs:
TypeError: Cannot read property 'token' of null
	at SessionManager.refresh (session.js:89)

title: Dashboard performance degradation with large datasets
description: The main dashboard takes over 15 seconds to load when there are more than 10,000 records in the database. The UI becomes unresponsive and users cannot interact with any elements.
steps:
1. Ensure database has 10000+ records
2. Navigate to the dashboard
3. Observe load time and UI responsiveness
expected: Dashboard should load within 3 seconds with pagination and lazy loading for large datasets.
actual: Dashboard takes 15-20 seconds to load. UI freezes during loading. No pagination is implemented.
logs: WARN: Query execution time: 12847ms for SELECT * FROM reports

title: Slow dashboard loading with many records
description: Dashboard page is extremely slow when the reports table has a large number of entries. The page appears frozen and the loading spinner never completes.
steps:
1. Load dashboard with large dataset
2. Wait for page to render
expected: Quick page load with virtualized table rendering.
actual: Page hangs for 10+ seconds, sometimes crashes the browser tab.

title: File upload fails for files larger than 10MB
description: When users try to upload CSV files larger than 10MB through the data import feature, the upload silently fails without any error message. The progress bar reaches 100% but the file is not processed.
steps:
1. Go to Settings > Data Import
2. Click 'Upload CSV'
3. Select a CSV file larger than 10MB
4. Click Upload
5. Progress bar completes but no data appears
expected: Either successfully upload large files or display a clear file size limit error message before upload begins.
actual: Upload appears to succeed (progress bar reaches 100%) but no data is imported. No error message is shown.
logs: ERROR: MaxUploadSizeExceededException: Maximum upload size of 10485760 bytes exceeded

title: Email notifications sent with wrong timezone
description: Automated email notifications display timestamps in UTC instead of the user's configured timezone. This causes confusion when users receive alerts about events showing incorrect times.
steps:
1. Set user timezone to IST (UTC+5:30)
2. Trigger an event that sends email notification
3. Check the timestamp in the received email
expected: Email should display timestamps in the user's configured timezone (IST).
actual: All timestamps in emails are in UTC regardless of user timezone settings.

title: Search returns no results for partial matches
description: The global search feature only returns results for exact matches. Searching for partial words or phrases returns zero results even when relevant data exists in the system.
steps:
1. Navigate to the search bar
2. Type a partial word like 'auth' (expecting results for 'authentication', 'authorization')
3. Press Enter
4. Zero results returned
expected: Search should support partial matching, fuzzy search, and return relevant results for partial queries.
actual: Zero results returned unless the search query exactly matches a title or description.
logs: DEBUG: Search query 'auth' matched 0 documents (using exact match)

title: Password reset email contains broken link
description: When users request a password reset, the email they receive contains a link that leads to a 404 page. The reset token in the URL appears to be truncated.
steps:
1. Click 'Forgot Password' on login page
2. Enter email address
3. Click reset link in email
4. 404 page appears
expected: Reset link should lead to the password reset form with a valid token.
actual: Link leads to 404 page. Token in URL is truncated to 32 characters instead of full 64 characters.
logs: ERROR: Invalid reset token: token length 32, expected 64

title: CSV export includes deleted records
description: When exporting data to CSV format, the export includes records that have been soft-deleted. These records should be filtered out from exports.
steps:
1. Delete some records from the dashboard
2. Go to Export > CSV
3. Download the CSV file
4. Open and check for deleted records
expected: CSV export should only include active (non-deleted) records.
actual: Deleted records appear in the CSV export with their original data.
logs: SELECT * FROM reports -- missing WHERE deleted_at IS NULL

title: Mobile navigation menu doesn't close after selection
description: On mobile devices, the hamburger navigation menu stays open after the user selects a menu item. The user has to manually tap outside the menu to close it.
steps:
1. Open the app on a mobile device (or resize browser to mobile width)
2. Tap the hamburger menu icon
3. Select any menu item
4. Menu stays open overlaying the content
expected: Menu should automatically close after a selection is made.
actual: Menu remains open, blocking the content below.

title: JWT authentication error causes white screen
description: The authentication module throws an error when processing tokens, resulting in a completely white screen for the end user. No error boundary catches this rendering failure.
steps:
1. Open the web app
2. If token is invalid or corrupted, the screen goes white
3. No UI feedback at all
expected: An error boundary should catch the rendering failure and display a user-friendly error page with retry options.
actual: Complete white screen with no UI. Must manually clear cookies to recover.
logs:
Uncaught Error: Invalid token signature
	at verifyJWT (auth.js:34)

title: API rate limiting not enforced for authenticated users
description: Authenticated API users can make unlimited requests without any rate limiting. This has caused server overload during peak hours when automated scripts bombard the API.
steps:
1. Authenticate with valid API key
2. Send 1000+ requests per minute
3. All requests succeed without throttling
expected: Rate limiting should be enforced (e.g., 100 requests per minute per user).
actual: No rate limiting. Server performance degrades under heavy load.
logs: WARN: User api_user_42 made 3847 requests in last 60 seconds

title: Data export to CSV contains soft-deleted entries
description: The bulk data export feature incorrectly includes entries that were previously soft-deleted by users. The SQL query does not filter by the deleted_at column.
steps:
1. Soft delete several records
2. Export all data as CSV
3. Deleted records still appear in export
expected: Only active records should appear in the export.
actual: Soft-deleted records are included in the CSV file.
logs: SQL: SELECT * FROM defects ORDER BY created_at -- no WHERE clause for deleted

title: Dark mode toggle breaks chart rendering
description: When the user switches to dark mode, the charts on the analytics page fail to re-render with the dark color scheme. Chart labels become invisible against the dark background.
steps:
1. Navigate to Analytics page
2. Toggle dark mode
3. Observe charts
expected: Charts should re-render with appropriate dark mode colors.
actual: Chart labels and axis text remain in black color, invisible against dark background.

title: Pagination offset error on filtered results
description: When applying filters to a data table and then navigating to page 2, the results show incorrect records. The pagination offset is calculated based on the unfiltered total instead of the filtered count.
steps:
1. Open data table with 500 records
2. Apply filter to show 50 matching records
3. Click page 2
4. Shows records from the unfiltered dataset
expected: Pagination should work correctly with filtered results.
actual: Page 2 shows records 51-100 of the unfiltered dataset instead of records 26-50 of the filtered set.
logs: DEBUG: Offset calculation: page * pageSize (unfiltered), should be page * pageSize (filtered)

title: Report dashboard extremely slow with 50k records
description: The reporting dashboard becomes unusable when the database contains approximately 50,000 or more report entries. The main query fetches all records without any pagination or data windowing.
steps:
1. Have 50k+ records in reports table
2. Open reporting dashboard
3. Dashboard takes over 30 seconds to render
expected: Dashboard should use server-side pagination and load within 2 seconds.
actual: Full table scan, all data loaded into memory. Browser tab crashes on low-memory devices.
logs:
ERROR: JavaScript heap out of memory
FATAL ERROR: CALL_AND_RETRY_LAST Allocation failed

title: Webhook delivery fails silently for HTTPS endpoints
description: Webhooks configured with HTTPS URLs fail to deliver without any error logging. The system shows delivery status as 'pending' indefinitely. HTTP endpoints work correctly.
steps:
1. Configure webhook with HTTPS URL
2. Trigger an event
3. Check webhook delivery status
expected: Webhook should be delivered to HTTPS endpoints successfully.
actual: Delivery status stays 'pending'. No error logged. HTTP webhooks work fine.

title: Concurrent user edits overwrite each other without warning
description: When two users edit the same defect report simultaneously, the last save overwrites the first without any conflict detection or merge. No warning is shown to either user.
steps:
1. User A opens defect BUG-100 for editing
2. User B opens the same defect BUG-100
3. User A saves changes
4. User B saves different changes
5. User A's changes are lost
expected: Optimistic locking or conflict detection should prevent silent data loss.
actual: Last write wins. User A's changes are permanently lost.
logs: UPDATE defects SET ... WHERE id = 100 -- no version check

title: Memory leak in real-time notification WebSocket handler
description: The WebSocket handler for real-time notifications has a memory leak. Each connected client adds event listeners that are never removed on disconnect, causing server memory to grow continuously.
steps:
1. Connect 100 WebSocket clients
2. Disconnect all clients
3. Monitor server memory
4. Memory does not decrease after disconnections
expected: Memory should be released when WebSocket connections close.
actual: Server memory grows by ~2MB per connection and never frees. Server runs out of memory after ~48 hours.
logs:
WARN: Process memory usage: 1.8GB (limit: 2GB)
ERROR: ENOMEM: not enough memory

title: Password reset link broken in email notifications
description: Users clicking the password reset link in their email are directed to a non-existent page. The URL construction logic appends the reset token incorrectly, cutting it in half.
steps:
1. Request password reset
2. Open email
3. Click reset link
4. Page not found (404)
expected: The password reset link should direct to a functional reset page.
actual: Link resolves to /reset?token=abc123 where full token should be abc123def456 (64 chars). Only first half is included.
logs: WARN: Password reset token validation failed - token too short (expected 64 chars, got 32)
